title: I Love That Crazy Little Thing
original_title: I Love That Crazy Little Thing
overview: Film editor Jiang dreams of becoming a director, but those dreams turn into a nightmare when his assistant, Meng, splices an unlicensed song into the soundtrack of a soon-to-be premiered movie. Not that Jiang's personal life is more successful, his girlfriend, Luo, being on the verge of breaking off their relationship.
